tool_args.label: New York City Transit Procurements - November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: New York City Transit Procurements. The Procurement Agenda this month includes 3 actions for a proposed estimated expenditure of $305.2M. November 12, 2025.

payload.title: New York City Transit Procurements
payload.description: Board procurement agenda for November 2025 covering 3 procurement actions totaling $305.2M: Schedule G (Clever Devices IVN maintenance), Schedule I (New Flyer bus modification), and Schedule D (Standard Steel wheel ratification).

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Clever Devices IVN Contract Award
tool_args.raw_text: It is requested that the Board declare...competitive selection process is inappropriate due to the existence of a single responsible source, and approve the award of a five-year noncompetitive miscellaneous service contract to Clever Devices LTD for provision of software maintenance and support services related to the Intelligent Vehicle Network (IVN) system in the estimated total amount of $40,194,597

payload.description: Board approval of five-year noncompetitive miscellaneous service contract to Clever Devices LTD for IVN software maintenance and support services

tool_args.label: New Flyer Option Bus Modification No. 9
tool_args.raw_text: It is requested that the Board approve the award of Modification No. 9 to Contract B40666-2 to exercise an option for the purchase of 219 low-floor 40-foot Option Buses (161 diesel-electric hybrid and 58 clean diesel) from New Flyer of America, Inc. in the estimated amount of $257,602,924

payload.description: Board approval of Modification No. 9 to Contract B40666-2 to exercise option for 219 low-floor 40-foot Option Buses from New Flyer

tool_args.label: Standard Steel Wheel Purchase Ratification
tool_args.raw_text: NYC Transit requests that the Board formally ratify the declaration of an Immediate Operating Need (ION) ... and approve the award of an estimated quantity contract made to Standard Steel LLC for the procurement of 3,000 subway car wheels. The award was made July 8, 2025, for a term of six months.

payload.description: Board ratification of Immediate Operating Need (ION) contract with Standard Steel LLC for 3,000 subway car wheels

tool_args.label: Clever Devices IVN contract total amount
tool_args.raw_text: $40,194,597 - Total Amount (including options): $40,194,597

payload.description: Estimated total amount of five-year noncompetitive miscellaneous service contract to Clever Devices LTD for IVN software maintenance and support services

tool_args.label: Clever Devices savings from initial to final proposal
tool_args.raw_text: Clever Devices submitted its Final Proposal in the amount of $40,194,597 which will result in a savings of $499,568 (1.2 percent) from its initial proposal

payload.description: Savings from negotiated reduction of Clever Devices proposal from $40,694,164 to $40,194,597

tool_args.label: New Flyer Modification No. 9 amount
tool_args.raw_text: This Request: $257,602,924 - Modification No. 9 to Contract B40666-2 to exercise an option for the purchase of 219 low-floor 40-foot Option Buses

payload.description: Estimated amount of Modification No. 9 to Contract B40666-2 for 219 Option Buses from New Flyer

tool_args.label: New Flyer 161 hybrid buses amount
tool_args.raw_text: 161 low-floor 40-foot hybrid buses in the estimated amount of $202,494,066 ($1,257,727 per bus)

payload.description: Estimated amount for 161 low-floor 40-foot hybrid buses from New Flyer

tool_args.label: New Flyer 58 clean diesel buses amount
tool_args.raw_text: 58 low-floor 40-foot clean diesel buses in the estimated amount of $52,511,687 ($905,374 per bus)

payload.description: Estimated amount for 58 low-floor 40-foot clean diesel buses from New Flyer

tool_args.label: New Flyer diagnostics tools, manuals, training, spare parts
tool_args.raw_text: $2,597,171 for diagnostic tools and manuals, training, and spare parts

payload.description: Estimated amount for diagnostic tools and manuals, training, and spare parts for New Flyer Option Buses

tool_args.label: Standard Steel contract total amount
tool_args.raw_text: Total Amount: $7,350,000 (est.)

payload.description: Estimated total amount of contract to Standard Steel LLC for 3,000 subway car wheels

tool_args.label: Standard Steel wheels quantity
tool_args.raw_text: Purchase of 3,000 subway car wheels

payload.description: Quantity of subway car wheels procured from Standard Steel LLC

tool_args.label: Standard Steel wheel price reduction savings
tool_args.raw_text: Procurement successfully received a price concession to $2,450 per wheel ... savings of $800 per wheel or $2.4 million

payload.raw_value_text: savings of $800 per wheel or $2.4 million
payload.description: Negotiated savings from reducing wheel price from $3,250 to $2,450 per wheel

tool_args.label: Clever Devices initial proposal amount
tool_args.raw_text: Clever Devices submitted a proposal in the total amount of $40,694,164, of which $23,331,255 (65 percent) is for previously existing scope and $14,362,909 (35 percent) is for new requirements

payload.description: Clever Devices initial proposal amount (before negotiations)

tool_args.label: Clever Devices previously existing scope portion
tool_args.raw_text: $23,331,255 (65 percent) is for previously existing scope

payload.description: Portion of Clever Devices initial proposal for previously existing scope

tool_args.label: Clever Devices new requirements portion
tool_args.raw_text: $14,362,909 (35 percent) is for new requirements

payload.description: Portion of Clever Devices initial proposal for new requirements

tool_args.label: Total procurement agenda expenditure
tool_args.raw_text: The Procurement Agenda this month includes 3 actions for a proposed estimated expenditure of $305.2M.

payload.description: Total proposed estimated expenditure for 3 procurement actions in this agenda

tool_args.label: IVN system interconnected with New Bus Radio System and New Fare Payment System
tool_args.raw_text: the IVN system is interconnected with the New Bus Radio System and the New Fare Payment System, both of which are now fully deployed across the entire bus fleet

payload.claim_text: The IVN system is interconnected with the New Bus Radio System and the New Fare Payment System, both of which are now fully deployed across the entire bus fleet.
payload.description: IVN system integration with other bus systems

tool_args.label: New Flyer buses outfitted with driver enclosure, OMNY, and Automated Camera Enforcement
tool_args.raw_text: These buses will be outfitted with new features including driver enclosure, OMNY, and Automated Camera Enforcement.

payload.claim_text: These buses will be outfitted with new features including driver enclosure, OMNY, and Automated Camera Enforcement.
payload.description: Features included on the 219 New Flyer Option Buses

tool_args.label: All buses in service equipped with IVN system as of November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: As of November 2025, all buses in service are equipped with the IVN system.

payload.claim_text: As of November 2025, all buses in service are equipped with the IVN system.
payload.description: IVN system deployment status across entire bus fleet
